mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name, type, default_monthly_amount AS defaultMonthlyAmount, default_expected_return AS defaultExpectedReturn FROM financial_node_template WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE type WHEN 'INCOME' THEN 1 WHEN 'EXPENSE' THEN 2 WHEN 'ASSET' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financial_node_template ( user_id, name, type, default_monthly_amount, default_expected_return ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{defaultMonthlyAmount}, #{defaultExpectedReturn} )

INSERT INTO financial_node_snapshot (user_id, template_id, year, month, name, type, current_balance, monthly_amount, expected_annual_return) SELECT t.user_id, t.id, #{year}, #{month}, t.name, t.type, 0, t.default_monthly_amount, t.default_expected_return FROM financial_node_template t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.id = #{templateId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM financial_node_snapshot s WHERE s.user_id = t.user_id AND s.template_id = t.id AND s.year = #{year} AND s.month = #{month} )
INSERT INTO flow_template (user_id, from_template_id, to_template_id, amount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fromId}, #{toId}, #{amount})
